title: aspidium squamigerum
intro: Aspidium squamigerum, also known as the forked polypody, is a species of fern found in Asia and other parts of the world. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver and kidney function. Aspidium squamigerum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
